titleStmt.title: SII 19.141: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 141. (A.R. No. 165 of 1925.) ĀRUPĀDI, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON TWO SLABS LYING ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE 2nd prākāra, TUṞAIKĀṬṬUM-VAḶḶALĀR TEMPLE, VIḶANAGAR HAMLET OF ĀRUPĀDI.

summary.p: This is an inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa. It records an endowment of some pieces of land made after purchase by Ōraṭṭaṇaṉ Śōrabbaiyār the chief queen (agramahādēvi) of Uttama-Chōḷa, for offerings during the mid-night service in the temple of Tirunāḷarkōyil-Mahādēva at Viḷainagar a brahmadēya on the southern bank. These lands are stated to have been got tax-free as ūrkkīḻ-iṟaiyili by the Peruṅguṟi-mahāsabhā of the village. Among the boundaries of a land mention is made of the river Neṟiyuḍaichchōḻa-pērāṟu, evidently the Kāvēri, so called possibly after the legendary Chōḷa king Manu, or after Gaṇḍarāditya who was known for this piety.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . ko
pparakecari pa
nmaṟkku yāṇṭu
5Āvatu teṉ
karai brahmateya
m viḷaiñkart ti
runāḻaṟkoyil
mahādevarkku
Uṭaiyār Uttama
coḻar Agramaha
deviyār Oṟaṭṭaṇa
ṉ corappaiyā
r Arddhayāmattu
kkut tiruvamurtu pa
ḻavarici nānāḻi
kkum Aṭaikkā
yamutukkumāka
koṇṭu kuṭuk
vāna
la �
śve

vilaiko
ṇṭa nilam
mukkāl ni
lam Eḻumā
kkāṇi mun
tirikaiyu
m caṅkirāt
tippuṟam ni
lam kāle
kāṇiyum
civakāmacu
ntariviḷāka
m nilam E
ḻumāvarai
yaraikkā
ṇiyum ka
ṇṇālavā
y kiḻtalai
villivāy
kku teṟku
nilam Iru
māvaraiyu
m kaṇṭakār
maṟukku vaṭa
kku nilaka
ṇṭaṉ tiru
varaṅkamu
ṭaiyāṉ ni
lam Irumā
varaiyum
pāppāku
ṭi Aka
nilam nā
ṉmāvarai
yum caṅkaran
puruṣotta
man nilam
nālu mā
vum Āka ni
lam nāle
mukkāle
muntirikaiyum
kollai pāppā
kuṭi paṭṭavirutti
nilam kālum co
kkaṉ kollai

ṭukkuk
ku meṟk
ku nilam nā
lu māva
raikkāṇi
yum neṟi
yuṭaic
coḻappe
rāṟṟukku
vaṭakku vā
ykka
koyiluṭai
yān ko
llai kiḻa
kkaṭaiya
nilam A
ṟu māvarai
yum cen
tapirān ko
llai kulai
kku teṟk
kum vaṭak
kum nilam
kālum
kāri nārā
yaṇa nuk
ku teṟkku
vāykkā
l niro
ṭukālil
Uṟa nilam
Oru māvum
Āka nilam
Iraṇṭarai
ye mu

kkāṇiyūm tirutturu
ttic coṉṉavāṟṟivār
tevatānattukku ki
ḻācaṟutikku meṟkku Ū
ruṇṇikkuḷattukku
kiḻakku Akalam kol
Eṭṭukku niḷam kol U
ḷḷutu Oṭaiyāyk kiṭan
ta civantāyapirāṉ vaṭavel
laikku vaṭakku Uḷḷutu Ūrkki
ḻiṟaiyili ceytukuṭut
tom peruṅkuṟi mahāsa
bhaiyom ..paṇiyāl
Ūrkkaṇakku viḷainaka
ruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
pālā[ śriyaṉ] ciriḷaṅko
Aruḷāḷapaṭṭa somayā
jiyār Eḻuttu cāvānti
Akki citarapaṭṭa somayā
ciyār Eḻuttu cāvā
nti mātavapaṭṭar Eḻu
ttu cāvānti poṟkoyi
lnampi Eḻuttu pālā
ciriyaṉ civatevapaṭṭaṉ E
ḻuttu pālāśriyaṉ
tevakaḷtevan māte
var Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 19.141 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
